name: universal-broker-sdk
description: A universal message broker kit for Node.js (Kafka, RabbitMQ, etc)

scripts.publish:all: npm run build && npm publish --workspace=packages/broker-core --access public && npm publish --workspace=packages/broker-kafka --access public && npm publish --workspace=packages/broker-rabbitmq --access public && npm publish --workspace=packages/broker-redis --access public && npm publish --workspace=packages/broker-sqs --access public && npm publish --workspace=packages/broker-nats --access public && npm publish --workspace=packages/broker-mqtt --access public && npm publish --workspace=packages/broker-activemq --access public && npm publish --workspace=packages/broker-serverless --access public && npm publish --workspace=packages/broker-hybrid --access public && npm publish --workspace=packages/broker-cli --access public && npm publish --workspace=packages/broker --access public

author: yadavmandeep
